channel.title: Japan on Mathieu Keller - Blog from Tokyo
channel.description: Recent content in Japan on Mathieu Keller - Blog from Tokyo

item.title: Flight Preparations
item.description:
Flight Preparations

Tomorrow is the day.
My flight to Japan takes off.
Did I really pack everything?
I still have the feeling that I forgot something.

I packed clothes, towels, sportswear, 12 deodorants (yes, they are important in Japan, since I have not seen any deodorant there so far),
plug adapters, a power strip, my spare glasses, sunglasses, toothbrush, razor, laptop, Nintendo Switch, and even an umbrella.
Of course, I also have various documents with me, such as my visa.
Even so, I still feel like I forgot something…
I will probably only find out in Japan whether that is really true.
